server.name: com.pulsemcp/remote-filesystem
server.description: MCP server for remote filesystem operations on cloud storage (Google Cloud Storage).

environmentVariables.description: Service account email for inline credentials.
environmentVariables.name: GCS_CLIENT_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Service account private key for inline credentials.
environmentVariables.name: GCS_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Path to Google Cloud service account key file.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Root path prefix to restrict access within bucket.
environmentVariables.name: GCS_ROOT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool groups: readonly or readwrite.
environmentVariables.name: ENABLED_TOOLGROUPS
